title: Monetary Policy and Financial Studies Division - Bank of Canada

## Subscribe to Monetary Policy and Financial Studies Division Monetary Policy and Financial Studies Division
- Jan David Schneider Jan David Schneider is a Senior Economist in the Monetary Policy and Financial Studies Division of the Canadian Economic Analysis Department. Department(s) : Canadian Economic Analysis , Monetary Policy and Financial Studies Division Research Field(s) : Business Cycles , Economic and Financial Networks , Quantitative Macroeconomics
